refinement_stylus.name: Refinement Stylus
refinement_stylus.description: A graphite-and-titanium stylus issued to certified Logicians. Used in Logic-State to physically prod a Corrupted Query into legibility. The casing carries a small Saint-Reed Institute pin.

refinement_chalk.name: Refinement Chalk Block
refinement_chalk.description: A blocky stick of institutional chalk, dense as compressed argument. Two-handed by reputation but wieldable solo. Each strike leaves a small line of dust on the room's reasoning.

rusty_dagger.name: Rusty Dagger
rusty_dagger.description: A worn dagger with spots of rust. Still sharp enough to be useful.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: A pitch-soaked length of wood, lit. Useful for hitting things, lighting things, and seeing what is hitting you.

iron_shortsword.name: Iron Shortsword
iron_shortsword.description: A practical iron blade, plainly made and reliably sharp. The starter weapon of every militia in five kingdoms.

steel_longsword.name: Steel Longsword
steel_longsword.description: A two-handed steel longsword with a worn leather grip. The blade is folded steel; the balance, decent; the previous owner, no longer in possession.

crystal_blade.name: Crystal Blade
crystal_blade.description: A blade forged from pure crystal, shimmering with arcane energy.

shadow_dagger.name: Shadow Dagger
shadow_dagger.description: A dagger that seems to absorb light, leaving trails of darkness when swung.

forge_hammer.name: Forge Hammer
forge_hammer.description: A massive hammer still warm from the cosmic forges, crackling with residual heat.

storm_feather_blade.name: Storm Feather Blade
storm_feather_blade.description: A sword adorned with storm hawk feathers, crackling with lightning.

cosmic_blade.name: Cosmic Blade
cosmic_blade.description: A blade forged from condensed starlight, leaving trails of cosmic dust.

void_shard_sword.name: Void Shard Sword
void_shard_sword.description: A terrifying blade made from crystallized void energy, cutting through reality itself.

dragon_quill.name: Dragon Quill
dragon_quill.description: A razor-sharp quill from a paper dragon, inscribed with powerful words.

tuning_fork.name: Initiate's Tuning Fork
tuning_fork.description: A small silver fork that hums a single pure note when struck. Weak as a weapon, but it cuts through illusion where steel cannot.

apprentice_tuning_fork.name: Apprentice's Tuning Fork
apprentice_tuning_fork.description: An older, heavier tuning fork than the Initiate's, fashioned from raw silver and engraved at the base with two letters: 'L.P.' The note it sings is a half-step lower than the modern fork - a sound the latest Eldoria initiates would not recognise. It feels warm in your hand. It does not feel finished.

drum_stave.name: Obsidian Drum-Stave
drum_stave.description: The Obsidian Drum-Stave, reforged by Morwyn Ironheart from your Tuning Fork. Each strike lands with the weight of Matter itself.

null_pointer_dagger.name: Null-Pointer Dagger
null_pointer_dagger.description: A short blade with no tip - the tip is a reference to an address nobody remembers allocating. It cuts anyway, spitefully.

stun_baton.name: Stun Baton
stun_baton.description: Standard-issue crowd-control tool from the Corporate Spires procurement catalogue. Certified to SLA, mostly.

packet_sniffer_pistol.name: Packet Sniffer Pistol
packet_sniffer_pistol.description: A compact pistol that reads the target's traffic before firing. Does slightly better damage when the target is already logged in.

shock_prod.name: Shock Prod
shock_prod.description: A length of conductive alloy with a pair of prongs at the business end. For reasoning with uncooperative processes.

root_kit_blade.name: Root-Kit Blade
root_kit_blade.description: A jagged blade assembled from whatever permissions the wielder didn't have. Each strike escalates.

kill_switch_pistol.name: Kill-Switch Pistol
kill_switch_pistol.description: A sidearm with one very final firmware function. Legal only in jurisdictions that do not check.

compile_error_rod.name: Compile-Error Rod
compile_error_rod.description: A rod etched with a stack trace that no debugger has ever successfully parsed. Hold it too long and your thoughts start to whitespace-mismatch.

fork_bomb_axe.name: Fork-Bomb Axe
fork_bomb_axe.description: A heavy axe whose blade splits into additional blades the faster you swing. Nobody has ever finished reviewing the spec.

ice_breaker_rifle.name: ICE-Breaker Rifle
ice_breaker_rifle.description: A two-handed rifle designed for cracking intrusion-countermeasure electronics. Reloads by asking politely.

segfault_cleaver.name: Segfault Cleaver
segfault_cleaver.description: A brutally simple two-handed cleaver that does not so much strike the target as access memory the target did not own.

obsidian_drum_stave_instrument.name: Drum-Stave Resonator
obsidian_drum_stave_instrument.description: A resonant echo of the Obsidian Drum-Stave, keyed to the Note of Matter. One of the five Primordial Instruments.

silver_harp_of_creation.name: Silver Harp of Creation
silver_harp_of_creation.description: Valdris's Silver Harp of Creation. Its strings are spun from light; when played, reality briefly writes itself.

golden_trumpet_of_change.name: Golden Trumpet of Change
golden_trumpet_of_change.description: Zephyros's trumpet. Its note is the note of transformation - nothing that hears it stays the same.

lute_of_whispering_shadows.name: Lute of Whispering Shadows
lute_of_whispering_shadows.description: Nyxara's lute. Its strings are woven of void; it plays only what has been forgotten.

crystal_flute_of_wisdom.name: Crystal Flute of Wisdom
crystal_flute_of_wisdom.description: Thessarian's flute. Each note is a paradox resolved; each silence is a question answered.

leather_vest.name: Leather Vest
leather_vest.description: Simple leather armor offering basic protection.

chainmail.name: Chainmail
chainmail.description: A shirt of riveted iron rings. Heavier than leather, kinder than nothing, noisier than either.

crystal_shard_armor.name: Crystal Shard Armor
crystal_shard_armor.description: Armor embedded with protective crystal shards that deflect attacks.

thorn_armor.name: Thorn Armor
thorn_armor.description: Living armor made of enchanted thorns, painful to attackers.

shadow_cloak.name: Shadow Cloak
shadow_cloak.description: A cloak woven from pure shadow, making the wearer harder to hit.

shade_robe.name: Shade Robe
shade_robe.description: Robes worn by mage shades, imbued with protective necromantic energy.

arcane_crystal_armor.name: Arcane Crystal Armor
arcane_crystal_armor.description: Legendary armor forged from pure arcane crystals, radiating protective magic.

cloud_wool_cloak.name: Cloud Wool Cloak
cloud_wool_cloak.description: A fluffy cloak made from cloud sheep wool, surprisingly protective.

mesh_jacket.name: Mesh Jacket
mesh_jacket.description: Street-level kevlar-and-wire jacket, standard in Neon Soi. Stops most knives and some firewalls.

chrome_plating.name: Chrome Plating
chrome_plating.description: Polished bodywork harvested from a Kowloon-42 billboard. Reflects gunfire and compliments.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.description: A simple wooden shield, better than nothing.

crystal_shield.name: Crystal Shield
crystal_shield.description: A shield of solid crystal that refracts incoming attacks.

void_barrier.name: Void Barrier
void_barrier.description: A shield made of condensed void energy, absorbing attacks into nothingness.

static_buckler.name: Static Buckler
static_buckler.description: A cheap polycarbonate buckler with a warranty sticker nobody has ever read.

riot_shield.name: Riot Shield
riot_shield.description: Corporate-issue transparent riot shield. Stops blunt objects, loud opinions, and the occasional manager.

holoprojector.name: Holo-Projector
holoprojector.description: An off-hand projector that generates a second, slightly-more-confident you about half a metre to the left.

ice_deflector.name: ICE Deflector
ice_deflector.description: Intrusion-countermeasure deflection plating salvaged from a corporate vault. Glows softly when scanned.

leather_cap.name: Leather Cap
leather_cap.description: A plain leather cap. Won't stop a blade, but it stops the rain.

iron_helm.name: Iron Helm
iron_helm.description: A dented iron helm. The previous owner stopped needing it.

bone_circlet.name: Bone Circlet
bone_circlet.description: A circlet of polished bone that hums when worn. Unsettling and effective.

traveler_amulet.name: Traveler's Amulet
traveler_amulet.description: A small amulet carved from oak. It brings a faint sense of calm.

warding_pendant.name: Warding Pendant
warding_pendant.description: A pendant inscribed with a single, steady rune of warding.

star_pendant.name: Pendant of the Pale Star
star_pendant.description: A pendant that holds a fragment of a dead star. Cold to the touch.

leather_gloves.name: Leather Gloves
leather_gloves.description: Worn gloves of supple leather. Good grip, little else.

iron_gauntlets.name: Iron Gauntlets
iron_gauntlets.description: Heavy iron gauntlets that double as knuckle-dusters.

runed_gauntlets.name: Runed Gauntlets
runed_gauntlets.description: Gauntlets etched with protective runes that glow faintly in combat.

worn_boots.name: Worn Boots
worn_boots.description: Boots that have walked a long road. Still have a few miles in them.

ironshod_boots.name: Ironshod Boots
ironshod_boots.description: Boots reinforced with iron plates. Loud, but durable.

stormwalker_boots.name: Stormwalker Boots
stormwalker_boots.description: Boots that seem to barely touch the ground when you walk.

silver_band.name: Silver Band
silver_band.description: A plain silver band. Warm to the touch for reasons you can't quite place.

signet_of_patience.name: Signet of Patience
signet_of_patience.description: A carved signet ring. Wearing it feels like holding your breath.

ring_of_the_archmage.name: Ring of the Archmage
ring_of_the_archmage.description: A black ring with a single chip of condensed magic at its center.

faraday_hood.name: Faraday Hood
faraday_hood.description: A mesh-lined hood that grounds out incoming signals. Wearing it makes you feel briefly unreachable.

vr_goggles.name: VR Goggles
vr_goggles.description: A set of heads-up goggles with lenses etched by somebody who saw the end of the tutorial once.

synth_boots.name: Synth Boots
synth_boots.description: Mass-produced boots in a plastic that outlasts grief. Comfortable, unflattering, indestructible.

gecko_grips.name: Gecko Grips
gecko_grips.description: Traction pads harvested from climbers who no longer need them. Hold to walls that don't want to be walked on.

encrypted_gloves.name: Encrypted Gloves
encrypted_gloves.description: Gloves with fingerprint-obscuring weave. Anything you touch with them leaves no trace, including your self-esteem.

rollback_ring.name: Rollback Ring
rollback_ring.description: A ring that lets you un-take the last hit, once. The process is subtle. Nobody has reproduced it on purpose.

retort_socratic.name: Socratic Retort
retort_socratic.description: A small folded card preprinted with a single, irritating, well-aimed question. Restores 25 Coherence in Logic-State combat.

retort_reductio.name: Reductio Retort
retort_reductio.description: A logical reductio printed on heavy stock. The conclusion it implies is so embarrassing that the holder feels visibly more lucid. Restores 35 Coherence.

retort_modus_ponens.name: Modus Ponens Retort
retort_modus_ponens.description: A short, perfect chain of inference. P. P implies Q. Therefore Q. The Q is you, briefly, restored. Restores 30 Coherence.

retort_ad_absurdum.name: Ad Absurdum Retort
retort_ad_absurdum.description: An accelerant for any conversation that has already gone wrong. Drops you on the other side of the wrongness with a slightly smaller deficit. Restores 40 Coherence.

retort_occams_razor.name: Occam's Razor Retort
retort_occams_razor.description: A small, clean blade that simplifies. Whatever you were holding before will, briefly, be the simplest thing in the room. Restores 45 Coherence.

retort_godel_strike.name: Godel Strike Retort
retort_godel_strike.description: An incompleteness theorem in fountain-pen ink. The retort makes the room briefly admit that it cannot prove all its own properties. The room concedes. The Logician recovers. Restores 60 Coherence.

minor_healing_potion.name: Minor Healing Potion
minor_healing_potion.description: A small red potion that restores 30 HP when consumed.

greater_healing_potion.name: Greater Healing Potion
greater_healing_potion.description: A larger healing potion that restores 75 HP when consumed.

superior_healing_potion.name: Superior Healing Potion
superior_healing_potion.description: A powerful healing elixir that restores 150 HP when consumed.

guardian_essence.name: Guardian Essence
guardian_essence.description: The essence of an echo guardian, providing minor healing.

ember_heart.name: Ember Heart
ember_heart.description: A glowing ember sprite heart that burns away wounds.

sprite_dust.name: Sprite Dust
sprite_dust.description: Magical dust from a garden sprite that provides light healing.

jellyfish_oil.name: Jellyfish Oil
jellyfish_oil.description: Luminous oil from a floating jellyfish with restorative properties.

wind_essence.name: Wind Essence
wind_essence.description: Captured essence of a wind elemental, invigorating when consumed.

digested_wisdom.name: Digested Wisdom
digested_wisdom.description: Knowledge distilled into consumable form by a bookworm.

eternal_raindrop.name: Eternal Raindrop
eternal_raindrop.description: A raindrop that never evaporates, providing refreshing healing.

null_essence.name: Null Essence
null_essence.description: The paradoxical essence of nothingness, strangely restorative.

nebula_dust.name: Nebula Dust
nebula_dust.description: Cosmic dust from a nebula wisp, powerful healing properties.

spell_essence.name: Spell Essence
spell_essence.description: Pure magical energy in consumable form, potent healing.

minor_mana_potion.name: Minor Mana Potion
minor_mana_potion.description: A small blue potion that restores 20 mana when consumed.

greater_mana_potion.name: Greater Mana Potion
greater_mana_potion.description: A larger mana potion that restores 50 mana when consumed.

superior_mana_potion.name: Superior Mana Potion
superior_mana_potion.description: A powerful mana elixir that restores 100 mana when consumed.

rejuvenation_potion.name: Rejuvenation Potion
rejuvenation_potion.description: A swirling purple potion that restores both 50 HP and 50 mana.

arcane_infusion.name: Arcane Infusion
arcane_infusion.description: A vial of pure arcane essence that fully restores even the greatest mages.

stim_pak.name: Stim-Pak
stim_pak.description: A pre-loaded injector of combat-grade stimulants. The label warns against reading the label.

root_beer.name: Root Beer
root_beer.description: A fizzing brown bottle that claims to be 'a refreshing beverage for hackers of every stripe.' Tastes of sugar and administrator access.

static_tea.name: Static Tea
static_tea.description: Lukewarm tea served in a ceramic mug with a small Faraday cage in the base. Settles the signal.

cold_brew.name: Cold Brew
cold_brew.description: Twenty-four-hour slow-steep coffee dark enough to absorb light. Patches you back together via spite.

patch_notes_scroll.name: Patch Notes Scroll
patch_notes_scroll.description: A scroll of pending patch notes. Reading them restores you in ways that are documented, if not tested.

admin_cola.name: Admin Cola
admin_cola.description: A matte-black can of cola in the Nomagios staff fridge. The brand has rotated nine times and never been refilled. Restores absurdly.

partition_chip.name: Partition Chip
partition_chip.description: A small, flat ceramic chip embedded in the back of your wrist after the Procedure. It allows the Sync Terminals to find you. Removing it is contraindicated.

townhouse_key.name: Townhouse Key
townhouse_key.description: A small brass key cut for Townhouse #4. The key was in your pocket the first time you reached for it. The cut is fresh; the brass has only just been touched.

pocket_finger_trap.name: Finger Trap
pocket_finger_trap.description: A small woven paper finger-trap, faintly stained. You cannot remember picking it up. Your Logician self, presumably, can. Or could, if your Logician self could remember being asked.

pocket_artifact_journal.name: Pocket Artifact Journal
pocket_artifact_journal.description: A pocket-sized notebook the Concourse Greeter handed you, bound in pale grey cloth. The first page reads: 'The other persona will leave things in your pockets. Write them down. They are speaking.'

theta_visa.name: Theta Visa
theta_visa.description: A laminated card, your photo printed too cleanly, your name spelled correctly, the words THE SAINT-REED INSTITUTE FOR HUMAN POTENTIAL embossed in pale silver across the bottom. It is a permission slip and a leash.

memory_fragment.name: Memory Fragment
memory_fragment.description: A crystallized fragment of forgotten memory, slightly glowing.

crystal_silk.name: Crystal Silk
crystal_silk.description: Shimmering silk spun by crystal spiders, valuable to merchants.

golem_core.name: Golem Core
golem_core.description: The magical core of a gem golem, pulsing with residual energy.

rainbow_wing.name: Rainbow Wing
rainbow_wing.description: A prismatic bat wing that splits light into beautiful colors.

wraith_essence.name: Wraith Essence
wraith_essence.description: Bottled essence of a marsh wraith, cold to the touch.

shadow_tongue.name: Shadow Tongue
shadow_tongue.description: The tongue of a shadow frog, useful for dark rituals.

wisp_light.name: Wisp Light
wisp_light.description: A captured will-o-wisp light, eternally flickering.

storm_feather.name: Storm Feather
storm_feather.description: A feather from a storm hawk, crackling with static electricity.

salamander_scale.name: Salamander Scale
salamander_scale.description: A heat-resistant scale from a fire salamander.

forbidden_tome.name: Forbidden Tome
forbidden_tome.description: A book of forbidden knowledge, whispers when opened.

lightning_core.name: Lightning Core
lightning_core.description: The crackling core of a lightning elemental.

thunder_egg.name: Thunder Egg
thunder_egg.description: An egg from a thunder bird, rumbles with contained power.

void_shard.name: Void Shard
void_shard.description: A fragment of pure void, seemingly consuming light around it.

reality_fragment.name: Reality Fragment
reality_fragment.description: A piece of reality itself, showing different worlds when viewed.

star_fragment.name: Star Fragment
star_fragment.description: A piece of a fallen star, warm and glowing eternally.

cosmic_eye.name: Cosmic Eye
cosmic_eye.description: An eye from a cosmic horror, seeing things beyond mortal comprehension.

arcane_crystal.name: Arcane Crystal
arcane_crystal.description: A crystal pulsing with pure arcane energy.

yen_chip.name: Yen Chip
yen_chip.description: A palm-sized chip of Neo Kyoto yen. The hologram on the back hasn't updated its face in a decade.

expired_eula.name: Expired EULA
expired_eula.description: A folded sheet of microprint terms and conditions. The agreements inside expired a long time ago; the words are still very sharp.

deprecated_cert.name: Deprecated Cert
deprecated_cert.description: A laminated identification wafer marked with a revoked seal. Worth real money to the right fence.

corrupted_datapad.name: Corrupted Datapad
corrupted_datapad.description: A slate whose screen boots to a login prompt for an OS nobody ships any more. The battery has outlived two empires.

neon_eye.name: Neon Eye
neon_eye.description: A synthetic eye still in its socket-ring. The iris advertises a bar that closed in Q3. The pupil still tracks light.

bytecode_shard.name: Bytecode Shard
bytecode_shard.description: A splinter of compiled-in-flight instructions that were never executed. Warm, slightly.

orphan_locket.name: Orphan Locket
orphan_locket.description: A small locket containing a checksum of someone's missing parent-process. It refuses to open.

deleted_memory.name: Deleted Memory
deleted_memory.description: A small sealed canister, heavier than it should be, labelled with a filename ending in .bak.gz.

dream_of_sheep.name: Dream of Sheep
dream_of_sheep.description: A tightly-folded scrap of paper on which someone has written, in neat handwriting: 'yes, we do.'

escalation_token.name: Escalation Token
escalation_token.description: A brass-coloured token embossed with the Nomagios logo and the word PRIORITY. Spent in the right window, it moves your ticket exactly one place forward.

waitlist_ticket.name: Waitlist Ticket
waitlist_ticket.description: A paper stub printed with a number long enough to be humbling. It reads, at the bottom: 'NOW SERVING: 7.'

access_keycard.name: Access Keycard
access_keycard.description: A matte-black keycard with no label. Carrying it makes certain doors decide they always liked you.

system_log_page.name: System Log Page
system_log_page.description: A single printed page from a log file nobody was meant to read. The timestamp is from last cycle. The content is from the one after this.

crystal_dragon_scale.name: Crystal Dragon Scale
crystal_dragon_scale.description: A magnificent scale from the Crystal Dragon, refracting light into rainbows.

shadow_crown.name: Shadow Crown
shadow_crown.description: The crown of the Shadow Lord, radiating pure darkness.

crown_of_the_realms.name: Crown of the Realms
crown_of_the_realms.description: The ultimate treasure, worn by the Archmage Supreme. Proof of conquering the Shattered Realms.

void_crown.name: Crown of the Void
void_crown.description: A crown that seems to absorb light itself, worn by the guardian of the void threshold.

void_heart_crystal.name: Void Heart Crystal
void_heart_crystal.description: A pulsing crystal containing the essence of void energy.

chiyo_expired_cert.name: Chiyo-7's Expired Cert
chiyo_expired_cert.description: A revoked blade-runner certification, signed by a department that has since been dissolved. Reads 'RETIRED' in the same tone a gun does.

managerial_letter.name: Managerial Letter of Recommendation
managerial_letter.description: A thick cream envelope sealed with corporate wax. The letter inside has not been read, but it is known to be, on balance, very positive about you.

babel_fish_crown.name: Babel Fish Crown
babel_fish_crown.description: A crown of interlocked translation nodes, still mumbling the last twelve words the Regent ever heard, in languages nobody in the realm speaks.

deep_pool_pearl.name: Deep-Pool Pearl
deep_pool_pearl.description: A pearl the size of a fist, heavy in a way that suggests it remembers being deeper. It refuses to roll.

sysadmin_root_key.name: SYSADMIN.EXE's Root Key
sysadmin_root_key.description: A brass key on a lanyard, cut by Nomagio himself some cycles ago. Dropping it produces an error sound from nowhere in particular.

iron_scrap.name: Iron Scrap
iron_scrap.description: A shard of raw iron. Crafting material.

ember_core.name: Ember Core
ember_core.description: A still-burning coal drawn from the Molten Forges. Crafting material.

harmonic_shard.name: Harmonic Shard
harmonic_shard.description: A crystal that hums in sympathy with spoken words. Crafting material.

fire_essence.name: Fire Essence
fire_essence.description: Bottled flame. Burns cold until broken. Crafting material.

herb_bundle.name: Herb Bundle
herb_bundle.description: A tied bundle of medicinal herbs. Crafting material.

mana_petal.name: Mana Petal
mana_petal.description: A petal that stores arcane energy. Crafting material.

phoenix_feather.name: Phoenix Feather
phoenix_feather.description: A feather that still remembers being fire. Rare crafting material.

sharpened_dagger.name: Sharpened Dagger
sharpened_dagger.description: A dagger honed to a whisper-edge by a weaponsmith's patience.

warhammer.name: Warhammer
warhammer.description: A two-handed hammer with an ember-warm head.

resonant_edge.name: Resonant Edge
resonant_edge.description: A blade forged around a harmonic shard. It sings when it strikes.

fire_ward_ring.name: Ring of Fire Ward
fire_ward_ring.description: Silver band etched with fire wards. Softens fire damage.

spell_focus_amulet.name: Spell Focus Amulet
spell_focus_amulet.description: A traveler's amulet wound with harmonic thread. Widens the well of mana.

minor_healing_brew.name: Minor Healing Brew
minor_healing_brew.description: A bitter brew that patches wounds closed.

mana_draught.name: Mana Draught
mana_draught.description: A petal-green draught that restores mana.

greater_healing_brew.name: Greater Healing Brew
greater_healing_brew.description: A phoenix-warm brew. Mends even deep wounds.

data_ward_amulet.name: Data-Ward Amulet
data_ward_amulet.description: An enchanter-sealed amulet wound with bytecode threading. Wearing it muffles incoming Data-type damage and the urge to read user-agreements aloud.

replicant_vow_ring.name: Replicant Vow Ring
replicant_vow_ring.description: A silver band soldered to an orphan-locket and a single neatly-folded scrap of paper. Worn in the Replicant Quarter as a vow that no process is unlinked while you have memory left. Attunes only to those who have stood with the Quarter.

resonant_blade.name: Resonant Blade
resonant_blade.description: A blade that vibrates with stored questing-will. QP redemption item.

quiet_ring.name: Ring of Quiet Hours
quiet_ring.description: A ring of brushed steel. The world hushes when you turn it. QP redemption item.

tier1_harmonist_crown.name: Crown of the Reborn Harmonist
tier1_harmonist_crown.description: A slim circlet of sound-etched silver. Only a Tier-1 Harmonist can wear it without going deaf. QP redemption, tier-gated.

tier3_symphonic_blade.name: Symphonic Blade of the Third Loop
tier3_symphonic_blade.description: Three times remorted, three times reforged. The blade hums in harmonic sympathy with its wielder's three-fold return. QP redemption, tier-gated.

tier3_data_blade.name: Server-Cleaved Blade
tier3_data_blade.description: A two-handed Data-type blade reforged from a fragment of SYSADMIN.EXE's outer casing. Hums faintly with the tone of a cooling rack. QP redemption, requires remort Tier 1+.

tier3_quarter_walker_boots.name: Quarter-Walker Boots
tier3_quarter_walker_boots.description: Boots stitched from rain-soaked leather harvested from the Replicant Quarter. They have walked the realm so often that the realm now politely steps aside for them. QP redemption, requires remort Tier 1+.
